result.summary: The page mostly renders correctly, but several elements appear clipped or obscured, suggesting horizontal overflow and insufficient spacing for fixed navigation.

issues.description: Game cards in the right column are cut off by the edge of the screen. Multiple rows show only part of the third card, which makes the layout look horizontally overflowing or improperly sized.
issues.suggestion: Adjust the responsive grid/card widths so cards fit within the viewport, or make the carousel behavior more explicit with proper spacing and swipe affordance.

issues.description: The fixed bottom navigation overlaps the game content near the bottom of the screen, partially covering the lower row of cards.
issues.suggestion: Add sufficient bottom padding to the page content equal to or greater than the bottom nav height so content is not hidden behind it.

issues.description: The top category navigation is clipped on the right side, with the 'Hot Games' tab only partially visible.
issues.suggestion: If this is a horizontal carousel, add clearer scroll affordance or spacing; otherwise resize tabs so they fit the viewport.

issues.description: The active 'Home' tab has a strong blue gradient/shadow that creates a slightly uneven visual edge at the bottom of the pill.
issues.suggestion: Refine the active tab styling so the gradient and shadow look intentional and consistent with the rest of the UI.
